description: A lightweight web dashboard for viewing OpenClaw bots, agents, models, and sessions status at a glance.

0.name: Foundation
0.description: Contain immediate exposure, establish secure defaults, and lock in the secure deployment model.

1.name: Sensitive Route Hardening
1.description: Close the remaining auth, route-boundary, and abuse-prone gaps on sensitive flows.

2.name: Runtime Boundary and Read Path Hardening

3.name: Residual Risk Cleanup and Closeout
3.description: Resolve remaining hardening items, verify fixes, and close the project with aligned docs and findings.
